clues: A group of employees connecting from a new branch office cannot access the corporate network via VPN.
VPN authentication succeeds but the connection is dropped immediately after establishment.
Other remote employees connecting from home offices connect without issues.
The new branch office uses a different internet service provider with a different IP range.
The Network Policy Server (NPS) has a policy that restricts VPN access based on IP address range.
